anchors.title: Accuracy and selection win
anchors.decision_rule: Prefer the summary that captures the main idea and essential supporting points accurately, even if another response is longer.

anchors.title: Copied or dumped detail is weak
anchors.decision_rule: Do not reward source-like fluency, copied wording, or excessive detail over concise synthesis in the student's own words.

anchors.title: No invented content
anchors.decision_rule: Major distortions or invented details can outweigh smoother organization.

caution_checks: Does the response select essential ideas rather than list everything?
Does it preserve the source meaning accurately?
Is length being mistaken for completeness?
